title: sample1 24h uninfected, cord blood CD34+ cells
treatment_protocol_ch1: Optimal cell density for replication was 5 x 10e4 CD34+ cell/mL. Following 4 days of expansion, cells were washed and diluted in SFEM II media without cytokine cocktail to the desired concentration. Culture purity was assessed by FACS and showed more than 90% of CD34+ events after expansion.
growth_protocol_ch1: StemSpan Expantion Media – SFEM II (STEMCELL Technologies)
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Nugen Ovation Trio input RNA Library Systems V2
extract_protocol_ch1.2: Illumina HiSeq 2500 adaptors for v4 chemistry
data_processing.5: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Raw count matrix from FeatureCounts output
